creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Move to github require update version to 3.5.4.

Not all local patches applied, for example patch-amandad-src__Makefile.in can't:
===>  FAILED Applying FreeBSD patch-amandad-src__Makefile.in
===> FAILED to apply cleanly FreeBSD patch(es)  patch-amandad-src__Makefile.in

Also I don't use this software - can't test work.
Are you willing to take on the job of updating and testing the port? I'll help if you take it on.
I'm not going to just waste time updating a port that neither I nor anyone else uses.
